name: Dan Soder
bio: Dan Soder is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and radio personality raised in Aurora, Colorado, known for his crowd-pleasing club sets and impressions, including a signature Macho Man Randy Savage. He co-hosted SiriusXM's The Bonfire from 2015 to 2023 and played Dudley Mafee on the Showtime drama Billions. His comedy work includes the Comedy Central hour Not Special and the 2019 HBO special Son of a Gary.

timeline.ev: Moves to New York City to pursue stand-up
Releases Comedy Central hour Not Special; joins Billions cast
Half-hour set on Netflix's The Standups
Releases HBO special Son of a Gary

accolades: HBO special Son of a Gary (2019)
Recurring role as Mafee on Showtime's Billions
